_comment: Ground truth read directly from the real Senus PLC filing 'Senus_HalfYearResultsDec2025_PR_V19032026 FINAL clean.pdf' (stored at storage/b48fa0f5-7729-4710-979f-4feb7b0dbcf2/d41650f3-6f2c-4d89-8435-e57c37640343/, copied to tests/fixtures/senus_hy2026.pdf), pages 5-7: Consolidated Profit and Loss Account, Consolidated Balance Sheet, Consolidated cash flow statement. Values are the document's own printed figures, not derived - this is what tests/test_extraction_regression.py asserts the real extraction pipeline reproduces, so a prompt change that silently degrades accuracy shows up as a test failure instead of shipping unnoticed. DEBT_SERVICE isn't stated as a combined interest+principal figure anywhere in this filing - only interest paid ('Interest payable and similar expenses'/'Interest Paid') is disclosed, which the extraction prompt treats as an acceptable interim-period proxy (see llm_extractor.py), so DEBT_SERVICE here equals interest paid alone. CONTINGENT_CONSIDERATION is absent from the HY2025 comparative period because the Loamin acquisition (which created it) hadn't happened yet - the filing's own comparative column is genuinely blank for that line, not a extraction gap.
